en.text: Engineering Dossier · 2021–2026 · DOC-ID: VG-DOSSIER-v2.1

zh.text: 工程档案 · 2021–2026 · 档案编号: VG-DOSSIER-v2.1

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: Finding every place people are forced to assume — and replacing each with a map that makes the assumption safe.

zh.text: 找出所有人们被迫依靠假设的地方——用一张地图取代每一个假设，让它变得可靠。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: Senior Software Engineer II · Dexcom (medical devices, 5 years) · Lean Six Sigma Green Belt · AI-collaboration systems architect

zh.text: 高级软件工程师 II · 德康医疗（医疗器械，五年）· 精益六西格玛绿带 · AI 协作系统架构师

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

zh.text: 实证

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: PROVEN

zh.text: PROVEN × 6

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: One method, six proofs

zh.text: 一个方法，六次实证

en.text: Across five years at a medical-device company — where software quality carries regulatory and patient-safety weight — the same engineering move was applied to six different problems at increasing scale. Each time, manual work done "at the surface" was replaced by a maintained map that structurally connects layers, so systems cannot silently drift apart.

zh.text: 在医疗器械公司的五年里——软件质量直接关系到法规与患者安全——同一个工程方法被应用于六个不同规模的问题上。每一次，都是用一张持续维护的地图取代表层的人工操作，让系统在结构上无法悄悄脱节。

en.text: YEARS 1–5 · LIVE

zh.text: 贯穿五年 · 持续维护

en.text: Mapping the organization itself — the living map

zh.text: 先为组织本身绘制地图——一张"活"的地图

en.text: Arrived to no map: no channels connecting Android developers, no forums, no directory of where anything lived. Built the human infrastructure first — a biweekly Android forum with open sharing and bug/innovation lunch-and-learns; a Confluence mapping the org (repos, documentation, dashboards including VnV testing tools); direct developer access to testing tools so engineers debug immediately instead of consuming another person's time; and later, XML→Jetpack Compose migration guides and an inherit-the-base UI doctrine that eliminated inconsistent reimplementations. Not a one-time artifact: a live page, appended and maintained across the full five years — early entries like the org map, late entries like the Compose guides, one continuously current source. Communication built audience-first — including a "3D" board of the fragment/navgraph hierarchy, each layer showing its responsibility and connections as a scannable pattern.

zh.text: 入职时没有任何地图：安卓开发者之间没有沟通渠道、没有论坛、没有任何资源目录。于是先搭建了人的基础设施——双周安卓论坛（开放分享、缺陷与创新的午餐学习会）；一个映射整个组织的 Confluence（代码仓库、文档、包括测试团队工具在内的仪表盘）；让开发者直接使用测试工具，无需占用他人时间去寻找；以及后期加入的 XML 到 Jetpack Compose 迁移指南和继承基础组件的 UI 准则，消除了同一组件的不一致重复实现。这不是一次性的文档，而是一张持续了整整五年的活页面——早期条目如组织地图，后期条目如 Compose 指南，始终保持最新。沟通方式以受众为先——包括一张"3D"导航层级图，每一层的职责与连接一目了然。

en.text: The methodology's origin and its endurance test in one: a map of people and knowledge, kept alive for five years.

zh.text: 方法论的起点，也是它的耐久性证明：一张关于人与知识的地图，被持续维护了整整五年。

en.text: YEAR 1

zh.text: 第一年

en.text: Analytics that cannot drift — BulkDataLogging

zh.text: 不会漂移的数据埋点系统

en.text: Replaced hand-written analytics code at every screen with one central map (ScreenName / ScreenMapper / ButtonName / MetaData) covering display, click, duration, and entry events. Delete a UI element and its logging entry goes with it — analytics and UI are structurally bound.

zh.text: 用一个中央映射系统取代每个页面手写的埋点代码，覆盖显示、点击、时长与录入事件。删除一个界面元素，它的日志条目随之移除——数据统计与界面在结构上绑定，无法脱节。

en.text: Medical-grade event logging with structural integrity, org-wide.

zh.text: 具备结构完整性的医疗级事件日志系统，全组织通用。

en.text: YEAR 2

zh.text: 第二年

en.text: Translations navigable in both directions

zh.text: 双向可导航的翻译系统

en.text: Extended the mapping principle to localization: every string traceable from code to every language and back, across Android, iOS, and design — "where is this text used?" answered structurally instead of by tribal memory.

zh.text: 把映射方法延伸到多语言翻译：每个文本从代码到各语言版本双向可追溯，横跨安卓、iOS 与设计——"这段文字用在哪里"由结构直接回答，而不靠个人记忆。

en.text: Foundation for the localization transformation below.

zh.text: 为下文的本地化流程转型奠定了基础。

en.text: MID

zh.text: 中期

en.text: The compound bug nobody could reproduce

zh.text: 无人能复现的复合缺陷

en.text: A missing low-glucose alert — patient-safety critical — was caused by two interacting defects across three teams' systems, one of which erased the evidence of the other. Resolution required first building the missing cross-system map by hand, instrumenting SDK-level code, and extracting reproduction steps inside a one-day window before the only witness left on vacation. Root cause: database indexes built without a wrapping @Transaction — an invisible absence.

zh.text: 一个丢失的低血糖警报——直接关系患者安全——源于横跨三个团队系统的两个相互作用的缺陷，其中一个会抹去另一个的证据。解决它需要先手工绘制出缺失的跨系统地图，在 SDK 层加入观测，并在唯一目击者休假前的一天窗口内完成复现步骤的提取。根因是一个看不见的缺失：数据库索引在没有事务包裹的情况下逐个生成。

en.text: The terrain map let senior architects perceive system relationships nobody had seen. Fix shipped; lesson institutionalized.

zh.text: 这张地形图让资深架构师第一次看清了此前无人看见的系统关系。修复上线，教训沉淀为制度。

en.text: YEARS 3–4

zh.text: 第三至四年

en.text: Localization: 6 months → 2 weeks

zh.text: 本地化流程：六个月缩短到两周

en.text: Through Dexcom-sponsored Lean Six Sigma work, unified fragmented Android/iOS string structures and re-architected the translation pipeline — then engineered the paid vendor tool out of the loop entirely with a single source of truth that regenerates all documents reproducibly, byte-identical, because every condition was mapped rather than assumed.

zh.text: 通过公司支持的精益六西格玛项目，统一了安卓与 iOS 割裂的文本结构，重构了翻译流程——随后用一个单一事实来源系统完全取代了付费供应商工具：所有文档可重复再生成、逐字节一致，因为每个条件都被映射，而非假设。

en.text: 6 mo → 2 wk

zh.text: 6 个月 → 2 周

en.text: lean cycle time — on-paper value in the millions

zh.text: 精益周期时间 — 账面价值达数百万

en.text: YEARS 3–4

zh.text: 第三至四年

en.text: The organizational join key — UIElementKey

zh.text: 跨部门的统一标识

en.text: Engineering, UX design, and quality testing each held IDs meaningful only inside their own silo. One composite identity — UIElementKey(platform, project, language, stringId, vnvTestId, uxDesignId) — resolved every discipline to the same UI element. Map first, align second: no team forced to change upfront. With the key live, the pipeline inverted: design issues keys upstream, platforms align by protocol, verification proceeds on a guaranteed assumption. Cross-discipline traceability — audit-grade in a regulated industry.

zh.text: 工程、设计与质量测试各自的编号只在自己部门内有意义。一个复合标识把所有部门解析到同一个界面元素上。先建地图，再做对齐：没有团队被迫先改。系统上线后，流程倒转：设计在上游发放标识，各平台按协议对齐，验证基于有保证的假设进行。跨部门可追溯——在受监管行业达到审计级别。

en.text: Reconciliation disappeared as a phase. Teams run parallel over a shared spine.

zh.text: 对账调和作为一个阶段彻底消失。各团队沿着同一条主干并行工作。

en.text: YEAR 5

zh.text: 第五年

en.text: PenSDK: the method applied to time itself

zh.text: 把方法应用于时间与并发本身

en.text: For an insulin-pen product where event order is safety-relevant: state changes flow through one SourceOfTruthRelay that derives and broadcasts truth so concurrent readers structurally cannot hold contradictory realities. Coroutines became ID-mapped, first-class tasks with scoped kill-switches — making a complex partner-SDK refresh cycle surgically manageable. Composes natively with Jetpack Compose.

zh.text: 在一个事件顺序直接关系安全的胰岛素笔产品中：状态变化经由单一事实中继推导并广播，并发的读取方在结构上不可能持有相互矛盾的状态。协程本身也被编号映射为一等任务，带有作用域开关——让复杂的合作方 SDK 刷新周期变得可精确管理。与 Jetpack Compose 天然契合。

en.text: Legacy

zh.text: 传承

en.text: Deliberately developed the team in these practices — before departure, they problem-solved independently with the culture intact. The practices outlived the practitioner.

zh.text: 有意识地把团队培养进这套实践——在离开之前，他们已能带着完整的文化独立解决问题。方法比实践者留得更久。

en.text: Analytics can't drift from UI. Translations can't orphan from screens. Localization can't fragment across platforms. Concurrent readers can't contradict each other. And now: AI instances can't re-introduce mistakes that were already corrected.

zh.text: 埋点无法脱离界面。翻译无法脱离页面。本地化无法在平台间割裂。并发读取无法互相矛盾。而现在：AI 实例无法重犯已经被纠正过的错误。

en.text: The sixth application: AI-maintainable systems

zh.text: 第六次应用：AI 可自主维护的系统

en.text: Every organization adopting AI coding tools is hitting the same wall: AI-generated work decays, because nothing preserves institutional knowledge between sessions. A new AI instance starts cold and re-introduces assumptions that were corrected months ago — the same disease as every fragmentation above, at the largest scale yet: context itself.

zh.text: 每个采用 AI 编程工具的组织都在撞同一堵墙：AI 产出的工作会退化，因为没有任何机制在会话之间保存机构知识。新的 AI 实例从零开始，重新引入几个月前已被纠正的假设——这与上面每一次割裂是同一种病，只是规模最大：割裂的是上下文本身。

en.text: The public working demonstration applies the five-times-proven method to this problem: a repository where CI self-maintains its own indexes; pull requests function as decision records (assumptions, cascading effects, notes for the next reader — human or AI); scaling ceilings are documented with migration paths before they're hit; and any fresh AI session bootstraps full context in one command. The escalation culture built with the human team — hard problems routed early, resolutions written back into shared knowledge — transcribed into architecture.

zh.text: 公开的演示项目把这个经过五次验证的方法应用于此：仓库的持续集成系统自我维护索引；每个变更是一份决策记录（假设、连锁影响、写给下一位读者的说明——无论人或 AI）；扩展上限在触及之前就已记录并配好迁移路径；任何全新的 AI 会话用一条命令即可加载完整上下文。当年与人类团队建立的协作文化，被转写成了系统架构。

en.text: What adoption changes

zh.text: 采用之后会改变什么

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: For an organization, this architecture is not a documentation style — it relocates where reliability comes from: out of individual vigilance and tribal memory, into structure that validates itself.

zh.text: 对一个组织而言，这套架构不是一种文档风格——它把可靠性的来源从个人的警觉与部落式记忆中迁移出来，放进能够自我校验的结构里。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: Engineering:

zh.text: 工程：

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: drift stops being a discipline problem. When analytics, strings, tests, and design resolve through one identity, divergence becomes structurally impossible rather than manually policed — and change review shifts from recalling impact to reading a computed impact report.

zh.text: 脱节不再是纪律问题。当埋点、文本、测试与设计通过同一个标识解析时，分歧在结构上就不可能发生，而不需要靠人工监督——变更评审也从凭记忆推测影响变成阅读自动生成的影响报告。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: Localization & product:

zh.text: 本地化与产品：

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: a new language becomes new rows, not duplicated pages. Vendors translate a meaning once and the graph applies it everywhere it is bound; plural, placeholder, and layout rules are validated per locale automatically.

zh.text: 新增一种语言意味着新增几行数据，而不是复制整套页面。供应商对一个含义只翻译一次，图谱会把它应用到所有绑定之处；复数、占位符与排版规则按语言自动校验。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: Quality & compliance:

zh.text: 质量与合规：

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: every change produces its impact report before it lands, and traceability from test to design intent to translation is audit-grade by construction. In regulated industries, that is the difference between proving compliance and reconstructing it.

zh.text: 每次变更在落地之前就生成影响报告，从测试到设计意图再到翻译的可追溯性是天生审计级的。在受监管行业，这就是证明合规与事后重建合规的区别。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: AI adoption:

zh.text: AI 采用：

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: agents stop re-deriving context. The graph is the memory; AI is the bridge into it — onboarding a fresh agent costs a query, not a repository read, and corrected mistakes stay corrected across sessions, tools, and vendors.

zh.text: AI 代理不再反复重推上下文。图谱是记忆，AI 是进入图谱的桥梁——让一个全新的代理上手只需一次查询，而不是通读整个仓库；被纠正过的错误在会话、工具与供应商之间保持已纠正状态。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: Leadership:

zh.text: 管理层：

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: the localization precedent above — six months to two weeks — is what this class of change does to cycle time. The same mechanics apply wherever teams currently reconcile by meeting instead of by map.

zh.text: 上文的本地化先例——六个月缩短到两周——就是这类变革对周期时间的作用。凡是团队目前靠开会而不是靠地图来对齐的地方，同样的机制都适用。

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

en.text: This document is itself the first artifact managed under the standard it describes: its record identifiers follow the concept-ID naming standard, legacy IDs are preserved as aliases, and the English and Chinese content regenerate from a single bilingual source. The proof of concept is the page.

zh.text: 本文件本身就是其所述标准管理下的第一个工件：记录标识符遵循概念命名标准，旧编号以别名形式保留，中英文内容由同一个双语源文件再生成。这一页，就是概念验证。

zh.text: 流程转型

identity.note: no data-legacy-id or title alias found for this content node

zh.text: 经精益六西格玛验证：实测将六个月周期缩短至两周，并获得跨团队采用。

en.text: This dossier practices its own method.

zh.text: 本档案实践其所述的方法。

en.text: Every record above carries a stable ID (proof-bulk-data-logging, proof-cross-domain-ui-identity…), named for concepts per the repository Registry Documentation Standard, with legacy IDs preserved as aliases, so any reader — human or AI, in English or Chinese — can reference, quote, or ask about an exact record without ambiguity. Identity first; discussion second.

zh.text: 上面的每条记录都带有稳定的概念命名编号（proof-bulk-data-logging、proof-cross-domain-ui-identity……），遵循仓库的注册表文档标准，旧编号以别名保留，任何读者——无论人或 AI，中文或英文——都可以无歧义地引用、询问某一条具体记录。先有标识，再有讨论。
